_doc: Per-target action checklists — the exact moves that SCORE, merged into farm targets by id. window = known snapshot/deadline window (advisory; verify on the official site). YOU do these actions + hold keys; I track them.

steps: Sign up at honeygain.com (referral optional)
Install the desktop app on BOTH Macs (more devices = more earnings)
Leave running; it shares idle bandwidth automatically
Cash out via PayPal/crypto at the $20 minimum
Mark this card 'active' once installed on both nodes
Go to app.getgrass.io, sign up, install the browser extension on Brave/Chrome
Run on both Macs; it earns + accrues GRASS points
Keep uptime high (points scale with consistent connection)
GRASS is cashable on Binance once claimed
Install the Nodepay extension (Brave/Chrome/Edge) and sign up
It uses idle bandwidth only (auto-pauses on heavy use)
Accrue points across both nodes toward the token
Read docs.alephzero.org testnet validator guide
Provision a node on a Mac (CPU-runnable) — follow their setup
Register the validator + keep it online (uptime is scored)
Track your validator in their dashboard for the airdrop allocation
This is the MESH EDGE — merit-scored far above swaps
Get the Shardeum validator/node software
Run a node on a Mac; keep it synced + online
Complete any node-operator tasks they post
Uptime + participation → airdrop chance
Connect a wallet at layer3.xyz (HOT wallet only)
Do curated quests (swap/bridge/stake) to earn XP + level up
Aim for a few quests weekly — consistency compounds
XP/levels qualify you for exclusive airdrops
Connect HOT wallet at app.galxe.com
Complete campaigns (follow/like + onchain tasks) for OATs/points
5 min/day habit; collect credentials across projects
Use MetaMask genuinely: Swaps, Bridge, Portfolio — real activity over time
Consistency + volume across months is what scores
Hold a non-trivial footprint; don't bot it (sybil-filtered)
Likely large allocation — one of the highest-potential drops

Place genuine bets on real markets (volume + recency scored)
DOUBLE DUTY: your positions become omnione's world-song sentiment feed
Spread activity over weeks, not one big bet
Join the Zama fhEVM testnet (zama.ai)
Do encrypted interactions + deploy a test contract (merit-scored high)
Contribute regularly across phases
GitHub-linked wallet boosts sybil resistance
Install the Lolli browser extension
Shop as normal at the 1000+ partner stores → BTC cashback (up to 30%)
Withdraw BTC at the threshold. Pure bi-product of spending you'd do anyway
Binance Academy + Coinbase Earn + CoinMarketCap Learn
Watch the short lesson, pass the quiz → free tokens
Repeat each new campaign across all three platforms
Browse live bug bounties at immunefi.com (sorted by payout)
Pick a protocol in your skill range; read the scope carefully
Audit + submit a clear PoC for any vuln found
Critical smart-contract finds pay up to $200k. Skill-gated but zero-capital
Keep the lab/dashboard OPEN-SOURCE with a clear public-goods framing

Document impact (it funds proven outcomes retroactively)
Get paid for what we already built
